WELCOME TO LEADERSHIP
YOU ARE NOW BEING CRITIQUED
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 19 --

PEOPLE WILL ALWAYS CRITICIZE WHAT
YOU DO AND WHAT YOU DON’T DO
THAT IS PART OF THE JOB.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 19 --

THE MORE SUCCESS YOU GAIN, THE MORE
CRITICS WILL APPEAR FROM THE WOODWORKS.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 19 --

PEOPLE HAVE A NATURAL TENDENCY TO
CUT DOWN THOSE WHO GROW.
WHY? IT MAKES THEM
FEEL INSECURE/SMALL
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 19 --

YOU CANNOT AVOID CRITICISM.
THEREFORE YOU NEED TO LEARN AND
LEAD BOLDLY THROUGH IT.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 19 --

HOW DO YOU REDUCE THE NOISE
OF THE CRITICS AROUND YOU?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 19 --

1
BUILD A POSITIVE CULTURE
STARTING WITH YOURSELF.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 19 --

YOU SET THE TONE FOR
YOUR SUBORDINATES
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 19 --

YOU NEED TO BELIEVE THE BEST IN
PEOPLE RATHER THAN THE WORST.
YOU NEED TO BE HELPFUL RATHER THAN HARSH.
YOU NEED TO LEAD FROM ABUNDANCE NOT FEAR.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 19 --

2
CREATE COUNTLESS AVENUES
FOR HELPFUL FEEDBACK.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 19 --

IT IS UP TO YOU HOW FEEDBACK IS
GIVEN AND INTERPRETED.
CREATE A CULTURE WHERE IT IS GIVEN IN A
HELPFUL WAY, RATHER THAN HARMFUL.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 19 --

YOU NEED TO LEARN FROM THOSE WHO CARE
ABOUT YOU ON THE INSIDE SO YOU AREN’T TAKEN
DOWN BY THOSE WHO DON’T ON THE OUTSIDE...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 19 --

3
LEAD WITH THE WHY
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 19 --

WE AS LEADERS ARE THE CHANGE
AGENTS. AND WHEN PEOPLE ARE
INFORMED, THEY RESIST CHANGE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 19 --

PEOPLE DON’T RESIST CHANGE BECAUSE
THEY DON’T LIKE IT, THEY RESIST CHANGE
BECAUSE THEY DON’T UNDERSTAND IT.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 19 --

INFORMING OF THE WHY WILL
DISARM CRITICS
EDUCATE BYSTANDERS
EMPOWER ADVOCATES
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 19 --

4
BE WISE IN HOW YOU LIVE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 19 --

YOU ARE NOW HELD TO A HIGHER STANDARD.
DO NOT DO ANYTHING BEHIND CLOSED DOORS
THAT YOU WOULDN’T IN FRONT OF YOUR TEAM.
AVOID SHORTCUTS, BE SELECTIVE IN HOW YOU SPEAK.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 19 --

IF YOU DON’T LIKE HOW THIS SOUNDS, OR DON’T
WANT TO BELIEVE IT TO BE TRUE, YOU SHOULD
NOT OWN A BUSINESS.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 19 --
